execution_policy: No task is 'done' unless verified in code and tests
Documentation alone never counts as implementation
Low-reasoning Codex prompts must be explicit, bounded, and evidence-driven
One step at a time; do not mix unrelated refactors

project_objective.current_state: Local MVP / prototype with fragile API contracts and weak test isolation
project_objective.target_state: Advanced MVP aligned with Laravel reference quality
definition_of_done: Isolated test database and negative/contract tests present
Frontend cleaned and aligned with API contract
Docs updated to match runtime reality

architecture_decisions.title: Items are always scoped to a parent list
architecture_decisions.rationale: Align domain with route contract and Laravel benchmark. Prevent cross-list access by design.

architecture_decisions.title: Validation is centralized in dedicated validators
architecture_decisions.rationale: Mirror Laravel request-based validation with explicit create/update/status validation flows.

architecture_decisions.title: Tests must use isolated SQLite database
architecture_decisions.rationale: Current suite mutates repository DB. This is unacceptable for reliable validation.

architecture_decisions.title: Environment controls DB path, CORS, and runtime mode
architecture_decisions.rationale: Hardcoded paths and open defaults block serious deployment hygiene.

architecture_decisions.title: No feature expansion before contract hardening
architecture_decisions.rationale: Authentication/API extensions before domain hardening would multiply defects.

critical_findings: Internal error messages leak to clients

phases.title: Domain Contract Hardening
phases.objective: Make nested list/item contract real in backend code and tests.

tasks.title: Enforce listId + itemId scoping in all item queries
done_when: Every item read/update/delete/status operation requires both listId and itemId
Impossible to access item through wrong list route
Model methods no longer use itemId alone for nested item operations

tasks.title: Contractualize 404 behavior for missing list and item resources
done_when: Missing list returns consistent 404 contract
Missing item inside valid list returns consistent 404 contract
Wrong-list item access returns 404, not accidental success

phases.title: Validation Layer Completion
phases.objective: Introduce explicit validator layer for all write paths.

tasks.title: Create dedicated validators for lists and items
done_when: Validators exist for list create/update and item create/update/status
Validation logic is not duplicated across controllers
Invalid payloads fail before reaching model layer

tasks.title: Validate route params and allowed status transitions
done_when: Invalid IDs return 400 with stable error shape
Invalid status values return 400
Empty or malformed update bodies return 400

phases.title: Test Isolation and Contract Tests
phases.objective: Replace happy-path-only testing with isolated and contract-focused coverage.

tasks.title: Move tests to dedicated SQLite database and bootstrap lifecycle
done_when: Tests never mutate tracked runtime DB
Test DB path is separate and environment-driven
Setup/teardown is deterministic

tasks.title: Add negative tests for nested ownership, validation, malformed input, and not-found flows
done_when: Cross-list item access test exists and passes
Invalid status test exists and passes
Update without required fields test exists and passes
Create item under missing list test exists and passes
Malformed JSON behavior is tested

phases.title: Runtime Config and DB Hygiene
phases.objective: Remove hardcoded runtime assumptions and separate environments cleanly.

tasks.title: Make database location environment-driven for dev/test/prod
done_when: DB path is read from environment
Dev/test/prod can use distinct database files
Startup fails clearly on invalid DB configuration

tasks.title: Document runtime bootstrap, DB initialization, and test setup truthfully
done_when: README matches actual server/test startup flow
No divergent setup instructions remain
DB lifecycle is explicit

phases.title: API Error and Security Baseline
phases.objective: Apply minimum viable hardening before any expansion.

tasks.title: Stop leaking internal errors and return stable API error payloads
done_when: Unhandled exceptions do not expose raw internal messages in production mode
Validation and not-found errors use a documented JSON shape
Tests cover representative error responses

tasks.title: Replace permissive defaults with configurable CORS and basic rate limiting
done_when: CORS origin is configurable
Rate limit exists for write-heavy endpoints or globally
Unsafe open defaults are removed or documented as dev-only

phases.title: Ops, Docker, and CI
phases.objective: Make the project reproducible and professionally shareable.

tasks.title: Add Dockerfile and docker-compose for local reproducible execution
done_when: App can be started with docker compose
Database file/storage mount strategy is defined
README documents container workflow

tasks.title: Add CI workflow for install, test, and optional frontend checks
done_when: CI runs tests automatically on push/pull_request
Workflow is deterministic and documented
Repository becomes shareable with reproducible validation

phases.title: Frontend Contract Alignment
phases.objective: Clean the frontend and align it with hardened backend contracts.

tasks.title: Remove permanent debug logging and make API base URL configurable
done_when: No noisy debug logs remain in production path
Frontend can target configurable API origin
Local and deployed behavior are documented

tasks.title: Map backend error contract into user-facing UI states
done_when: Validation and not-found errors show controlled UI feedback
UI does not assume success-only flows
Frontend behavior matches backend contract

phases.title: Docs and Release Readiness
phases.objective: Make repo narrative and runtime reality converge.

tasks.title: Rewrite README to reflect actual architecture, setup, tests, and deployment
done_when: README describes real setup only
API routes and contracts match code
Testing and Docker sections are accurate

tasks.title: Run final repo audit against Laravel benchmark and close remaining gaps
done_when: All critical findings are closed
Major findings are either closed or explicitly deferred
Project can be described as advanced MVP with evidence

milestones.title: Advanced MVP Comparable to Laravel Reference
